hero.headline: You run the business.
hero.subhead: More reviews. Higher Google rankings. Every call answered. Karl is an AI marketing director for local businesses — dentists, plumbers, accountants, and more. He brings his own team and handles your entire marketing.
hero.trustLine: From €299/month · No contracts · GDPR-native · Built in Stockholm

trustBar.text: Built in Stockholm · GDPR-native · Works across Europe

dayWithKarl.headline: Here is what Karl and his team can do for a dental practice on a typical Tuesday.
dayWithKarl.subhead: The dentist sees patients all day. She doesn't open a dashboard, write a social post, or check her reviews. Karl and his team handle everything around her business while she runs it.
dayWithKarl.cta: See how your business looks online

dashboard.headline: Check in whenever you want.
dashboard.subhead: Your dashboard shows everything Karl and his team are doing — reviews, listings, social posts, ads, and messages. Log in any time, or just read Karl's weekly email summary.
dashboard.screenshotAlt: Vendasta Business App executive overview showing review summary, listing accuracy, and recent activity

capabilityExplorer.headline: Eight specialists. One director. Zero effort from you.
capabilityExplorer.subhead: You talk to Karl. He coordinates everything. Click each role to see what that specialist handles.

pricing.headline: Transparent pricing.
pricing.subhead: Every plan includes Karl as your marketing director. Higher tiers give him a bigger team.
pricing.noContracts: No contracts · No onboarding fees · Cancel anytime

setup.headline: What happens when you sign up.

day1.label: Day 1
items: Karl's receptionist is live — answering web chat, social messages, and WhatsApp
Karl's SEO analyst reviews your Google Business Profile and begins optimisation
Karl's listings coordinator submits your business to 40+ directories for sync

week1.label: Week 1
items: Karl's review specialist sends first review requests to recent customers
Karl's content creator publishes first social media posts to your channels
Your local SEO grid is set up — you can see where you rank

ongoing.label: Ongoing
items: Monthly report from Karl: what his team did, what changed, what's planned next
You can text Karl any time — changes, questions, requests
Every specialist runs continuously without you logging into anything

finalCta.headline: You run the business.
finalCta.subhead: See how your business looks online — your reviews, listings, social media, and website — with a clear picture of what Karl and his team would do for you.

chat.msg1You: We're closing at 3pm on Fridays now.
chat.msg1Karl: Done. I've had my listings coordinator update it on Google Maps, Apple Maps, Yelp, Jameda, and 37 other directories.
chat.msg2You: Did anyone call while I was with a patient?
chat.msg2Karl: Two calls. My receptionist handled both — one reschedule confirmed for Tuesday, and a new whitening enquiry booked for Thursday 3pm. Details in your inbox.

PricingPage.headline: Transparent pricing.
PricingPage.subhead: Three plans. One agent. No surprises.
PricingPage.noContracts: No contracts · No onboarding fees · Cancel anytime
PricingPage.cta: See how your business looks online
PricingPage.alaCarteSubhead: Add individual capabilities to any plan. Pay only for what you need.

faq.q: Do I have to sign a contract?
faq.a: No. Month-to-month. Cancel anytime with a single email.
No. Zero. We connect your accounts on Day 1 and Karl starts immediately.
Within the first week. Your AI receptionist is live on Day 1. First review requests go out in the first 3–7 days. Social posts start Week 1.

faq.q: Does Karl work for my industry?
faq.a: If your customers leave reviews and search for you locally, yes. We focus on healthcare, professional services, home and trade, and automotive.

faq.q: Is my data safe under GDPR?
faq.a: Karl is GDPR-native. Built in Stockholm, operating under European data law. Your data stays in the EU.
English and German at launch. Dutch and Swedish are in development.
Yes, anytime. Contact us and we'll change your plan effective the following month.

finalCta.headline: Ready to see how your business looks online?
finalCta.subhead: Get your free assessment — no credit card, no commitment.
